html:
2026-0594
2026-06-12FIN, GACExport and Import Permits Act
Customs TariffOrder Amending the Import Control List (2026-3)Order Amending the Import Control List (2026-3) in order to (1) extend the repeal date for Item 82 (steel goods under the Order Imposing a Surtax on the Importation of Certain Steel Goods) to June 28, 2027; and (2) update Item 82 to incorporate the reclassification of certain steel products and technical adjustments to quota volumes made by the Order Amending the Order Imposing a Surtax on the Importation of Certain Steel Goods.Registration: SOR/2026-0120 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
act:
Export and Import Permits Act
Customs Tariff
subject: Order Amending the Import Control List (2026-3)
precis: Order Amending the Import Control List (2026-3) in order to (1) extend the repeal date for Item 82 (steel goods under the Order Imposing a Surtax on the Importation of Certain Steel Goods) to June 28, 2027; and (2) update Item 82 to incorporate the reclassification of certain steel products and technical adjustments to quota volumes made by the Order Amending the Order Imposing a Surtax on the Importation of Certain Steel Goods.
